content:
Virgo July 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Home and community — friends widen, work finds its rhythm
Key Dates New Moon Jul 13 (Cancer, 11th house) / Mercury Rx ends Jul 23 / Full Moon Jul 29 (Aquarius, 6th house)
Love 11th house New Moon supports friendship-as-love; a friend becomes more
Career 6th house Aquarius Full Moon brings a work or routine climax
Crystal of the Month Selenite
Lucky Colors Sage green, ivory, slate blue
Lucky Number 5
Affirmation I let the circle widen; the work finds me ready.

This Month’s Energy

Virgo, July 2026 begins with friends, ends with work. Mercury — your ruling planet — remains retrograde in Cancer (your 11th house of community and friendship) until July 23, continuing the network-and-future-vision review June began. The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 also falls in your 11th house, doubling the community emphasis. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing communications. The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 lights up your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a climax around a job, a body practice, or a daily-grind commitment. July’s job is to widen the circle early, then let the work find its rhythm.

Key Dates for Virgo in July 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Virgo Do / Avoid
Jul 13 New Moon in Cancer 11th house — fresh start in friendship, community, networks, future vision Do: join the group, host the gathering, name the future you want
Avoid: going it alone when allies are available
Jul 23 Mercury turns direct Your ruling planet stations direct — community and friendship communications clear Do: send the important message, make the announcement, sign the contract (carefully)
Avoid: expecting instant clarity — give it a few days
Jul 29 Full Moon in Aquarius (Buck Moon) 6th house — work, routine, health climax; a job, body practice, or daily-grind commitment peaks Do: lock in the routine, accept the role, commit to the body practice
Avoid: overcommitting to others’ emergencies
Jul 1–22 Mercury Rx continues (Cancer, 11th house) Friendship and community communications remain scrambled; old group patterns surface Do: rest, journal on group patterns, mend one important friendship
Avoid: group confrontations, signing collaborative agreements
Jul 5 Venus enters Gemini 10th house Venus — public love, career magnetism, a professional crush Do: show up publicly, network upward, accept the visible role
Avoid: hiding your light
Jul 22 Sun enters Leo 12th house season — rest, retreat, closure before your birthday Do: rest more, journal, release what no longer fits
Avoid: scheduling a launch before your birthday

Career & Money

For Virgo, July’s career story is backloaded. Mercury remains retrograde in your 11th house of community and networks — so the first three weeks favor inner work on group dynamics, future-vision, and collaborative patterns. Then Mercury turns direct on July 23, clearing communications for new initiatives.

The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 falls in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — for Virgo, this is the year’s biggest work-and-routine climax. A job, a daily-grind commitment, a body practice, or a work reorganization reaches a turning point. Combined with the 11th house New Moon two weeks earlier, the end of July supports finding the right community of work — a team, a network, a workplace that fits. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is patient documentation through Mercury Rx, then bold action after July 23.

Love & Relationships

The New Moon in Cancer on July 13 falls in your 11th house of friendship and community. For Virgo, this is a love doorway: friendship-as-love, a friend becomes more, a community welcomes you in. Many Virgos will meet someone significant through a group this month.

Venus entering Gemini on July 5 (your 10th house of public reputation) supports love at work, public romance, a professional crush. The 6th house Full Moon on July 29 brings a routine-and-body climax — and Virgo’s relationships thrive when the daily rhythm is steady. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the friendship deepen without over-analyzing it.

Health & Wellness

The Buck Full Moon in Aquarius on July 29 is your annual wellness climax — for Virgo, this is one of the most important body-and-routine moments of the year. A fitness goal peaks, a routine locks in, or a health concern demands attention. Virgo’s natural detail-orientation becomes a superpower here — the small habits compound.

The Sun in Leo from July 22 (your 12th house) brings a need for rest and closure before your birthday. Selenite, your crystal of the month, is the perfect stone for clearing mental static and energetic debris during this transition. Mars-ruled Virgo can stress the digestive system; gentle nutrition and slow eating are medicine. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Selenite

Why Selenite fits Virgo this month. You are Mercury-ruled, and July opens with Mercury Rx in your 11th house — community and future-vision work that asks for mental clarity about who your people are. Selenite, traditionally tied to crown-chakra opening, mental clarity, and energetic clearing, is the stone that clears the mental static around friendship and belonging. Where Moonstone (June’s stone) cooled the inner critic, Selenite clarifies the channel.

How to use it during July 2026. Place a Selenite tower on your desk through the Mercury retrograde that ends July 23. Hold it in your receiving hand on July 13 (the 11th-house New Moon) while you journal on the friendships and communities you want to call in.

Best date to use it: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 11th house — Selenite in your receiving hand while you name the community you’re ready to belong to.

Read more: Selenite Meaning and Best Crystals for Virgo.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Virgo — July 2026

When: July 13, the Cancer New Moon in your 11th house.
Crystal: Selenite.
Intention: Call in the community that fits; let the circle widen consciously.

  1. Cleanse Selenite by wiping with a dry cloth (no water — Selenite is water-soluble).
  2. Set the intention on the 11th house theme: write down three qualities of the community you want to belong to — and one group or gathering you’ll join before the Full Moon.
  3. Act by joining the group or attending the gathering between July 13 and July 29. Selenite in your pocket during the event.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29: what work or routine is the new community asking you to commit to? Carry Selenite during the review.

Shop Virgo Crystals for July 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Virgo crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, mental clarity, healing, and routine — including the Selenite that clears the mental channel during a community-and-work month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Virgo July 2026

Is July 2026 a good month for Virgo?

Yes — the year’s biggest work-and-routine climax arrives with the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29. The first three weeks continue Mercury Rx in your 11th house, so use them to widen the circle and prepare.

How should Virgo handle Mercury Rx (in your 11th house, continuing from June) until July 23?

Friendship and community communications remain scrambled. Journal on group patterns, mend one important friendship, and avoid signing collaborative agreements until after July 23.

What does the Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 mean for Virgo work?

It falls in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — the year’s biggest work-and-routine climax. A job, daily-grind commitment, or body practice reaches a turning point.

What is the best crystal for Virgo in July 2026?

Selenite — it clears the mental channel for community-and-work decisions, perfectly matched to an 11th-house New Moon and a 6th-house Full Moon. See the full Virgo crystal guide →

How does Venus in Gemini affect Virgo career visibility?

Venus in your 10th house (from July 5) supports public magnetism and visible roles. Show up publicly, network upward, accept the role that puts you in front of people.

Should Virgo start a new job in July 2026?

If possible, wait until after July 23. Mercury Rx through the 23rd scrambles contract details. After July 23, the 6th house Aquarius Full Moon on July 29 supports work commitments.
